## ⚠️ BEFORE SUBMITTING

**Did you modify `aimf_core/`?** 
- [ ] No → proceed below
- [ ] Yes → STOP. Did you open an issue first and get approval? 
  - If no: close this PR — it will be rejected automatically
  - If yes: link the issue here: #______

---

## Description

What does this PR do?

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that breaks existing API)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `cargo fmt --all`
- [ ] I have run `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`
- [ ] I have run `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] I have updated documentation (if needed)
- [ ] I have added tests (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes don't break existing examples

## Testing performed

Describe how you tested this change:

```bash
# Example commands you ran
cargo test --test integration_test
./target/release/aimf info test_file.avid
